/usr/bin/ar qc libmicro_isosurface_inflator.a CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/AABBTree.cc.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/BilinearMap.cc.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/BoxIntersectionMesher.cc.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/DynamicKdTree.cc.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/IGLSurfaceMesherMC.cc.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/IsosurfaceInflator.cc.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/MeshingOptions.cc.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/MidplaneMesher.cc.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/PostProcess.cc.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/rasterize.cc.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/VCGSurfaceMesher.cc.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/VDBTools.cc.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/quadfoam/jacobians.cpp.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/quadfoam/navigation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/micro_isosurface_inflator.dir/quadfoam/instantiate.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmicro_isosurface_inflator.a
